sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40188" key="e)pimesoura/nhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιμεσουράνημα</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰν], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n40188.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">culmination</tr_> of a star just after sunrise or just after sunset, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
